info.title: DB API — Multitenant REST API
info.description:
Laravel 13 API with DDD/CQRS architecture and table-per-tenant multi-tenancy.

## Authentication
All write endpoints require a Bearer token issued by Laravel Passport.
Obtain one via `POST /oauth/token` (standard Passport password grant).

## Multitenancy
Every request must target a tenant via the URL `/tenant_id/v1/...`.
Tenant identifiers are 3-63 lowercase alphanumeric characters (hyphens/underscores allowed).

## Module gating
Some endpoints require the tenant to have a specific module enabled.
If a module is disabled, the API returns **403** with the message
`"Module 'X' is not enabled for this tenant"`.

## Standard response envelope
All endpoints return a consistent JSON envelope:
```json
{
  "success": true,
  "data": { ... },
  "message": "Operation completed successfully"
}
```
Errors replace `data` with `errors` (validation details).

post.description: Create a new form with dynamic field definitions. Returns the persisted form id on success.

get.description: Retrieve form schema including field definitions. Authenticated only.

post.description: Submit form data to a published form. Public endpoint. Subject to anti-spam checks (honeypot + rate limiting 5 per 60s per IP).

requestBody.description: Form submission data — keys/values match form field definitions. Include the empty 'honeypot' field for anti-spam.

403.description: Spam detected or rate limit exceeded or form inactive

422.description: Validation failed or missing required fields

get.description: Get all registered and active languages for this tenant. Used for translatable content (posts, pages, etc.)

post.description: Create a new language definition for translatable content. Language codes must be ISO 639-1 (2-letter codes like 'en', 'es', 'fr').

native_name.description: Language name in its native language

422.description: Validation error (invalid code format or duplicate)

get.description: Retrieve a specific language definition by its UUID.

post.summary: Create a page with its first language translation
post.description: Create a new page with block editor content and SEO metadata. Content must follow block editor schema (rows/columns/blocks). Each translation is stored in intermediate table per language.

requestBody.description: Page data with translatable fields. Content is block editor JSON.

422.description: Validation error (invalid content schema or language)

get.summary: Get a page by ID in a specific language
get.description: Retrieve a page in the requested language. If language translation doesn't exist, returns first available translation.

put.summary: Update a page or add/update a translation
put.description: Update page content for a specific language. If translation exists, updates it; if not, creates new translation. Can also update page status (core field).

success.description:
OpenAPI specification for DB API.

Central definition file — every annotation here is merged with per-controller
annotations scanned by l5-swagger (scan paths: app/, src/).

key.description: Unique form key used in public submission URL

Page.description: Translatable page with block editor content

bearerAuth.description: Laravel Passport token. Obtain via POST /oauth/token (password grant).

tags.name: Blogging - Posts
tags.description: Translatable blog posts with SEO, OG, categories and tags

tags.name: Forms
tags.description: Dynamic form definitions, public submissions, anti-spam (honeypot + rate-limit)

tags.name: Identity - Users
tags.description: Cross-module user management (always available, no module gate)

tags.name: Languages
tags.description: ISO 639-1 language catalog for translatable content

tags.name: Pages
tags.description: Translatable pages with block editor content and full SEO/OG/JSON-LD metadata

tags.name: TodoList - Tasks
tags.description: Simple tasks with status (pending/in_progress/done) and priority (low/medium/high)
